lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained. There is some minor cosmetic wear on the interior and exterior from normal use.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for daily commuting. While the engine and transmission function as expected, the car shows noticeable signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger door, and the interior upholstery shows some staining and wear on the driver's seat. It has been regularly serviced, but prospective buyers should anticipate some upcoming maintenance typical for a car of this age.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently maintained. The exterior paint still holds a nice shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the passenger side door. The interior is clean and well-kept, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is solid and drives well, with all major systems functioning as they should. It is a reliable, honest car that has served its current owner well and is ready for many more miles.

Step into luxury with this absolutely stunning vehicle! It is in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to look and drive like it just left the factory. This is a rare opportunity to own a flawless car that truly stands out from the crowd—it's perfection on wheels!

The vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission are well-maintained and function reliably. The exterior is clean with a few minor surface scratches. The interior is well-kept and shows light wear.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a rigorous concours standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting an immaculate exterior finish and a cabin that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically flawless and accompanied by a comprehensive service history, this vehicle offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey! I'm so excited to show you this absolute gem. It is honestly in flawless condition—I’ve taken such good care of it that it still looks and smells brand new! Not a single blemish inside or out, and it runs perfectly. I'm only selling because I'm downsizing, but I know whoever gets this beauty is going to be thrilled. Come take a look and see for yourself!

This specimen represents a benchmark in mechanical preservation and engineering integrity. Powered by a high-revving, naturally aspirated power plant, the engine exhibits flawless compression and peak volumetric efficiency. The drivetrain features a precision-gated 6-speed manual gearbox paired with a factory-calibrated limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, supported by a meticulously maintained multi-link suspension with zero bushing deflection. Every mechanical component, from the four-piston monoblock calipers to the precisely tuned exhaust manifold, reflects an uncompromising standard of care. This is a turn-key, concours-ready example for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service history. Inspections welcome.

Step into a vehicle that looks and feels as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This meticulously maintained masterpiece is in breathtaking condition, representing the pinnacle of automotive care. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like finish, completely free of swirls, rock chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine leather and untouched trim; the seats show zero bolster wear, and the original carpets remain spotless. Every electronic feature functions flawlessly, and the mechanical performance is silent and powerful, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history. Garage-kept under a climate-controlled environment and never driven in inclement weather, this car is a rare find for the discerning collector who demands perfection in every detail.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. An unrivaled opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber, maintained to an impeccable standard. This vehicle represents the zenith of its class, boasting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Meticulously preserved and mechanically superior, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning collector who demands perfection without compromise. Acquisition of this vehicle ensures both prestige and performance in their purest forms.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute gem of a car, and honestly, it’s a total dream! It is in pristine, showroom-level condition—I’ve babied this beauty from day one, so it’s spotless inside and out. It looks and drives just like it’s brand new! If you’re looking for something that’s been loved and meticulously cared for, this is the one for you. I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

Offered is an impeccably preserved specimen of the E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This high-revving power plant delivers a linear power band up to its 8,400 RPM redline, managed by a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT. The chassis remains taut, equipped with Electronic Damping Control (EDC) and the M-variable differential lock for surgical cornering precision. Mechanically sorted with documented preventative rod bearing and throttle actuator service. The exterior retains its factory luster with zero panel gap irregularities, while the interior showcases pristine Novillo leather. A turn-key investment for the discerning purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Used vehicle. Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Low mileage. Garage kept. Service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that serves as a benchmark for automotive preservation. This car remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously kept in a climate-controlled environment and driven only on fair-weather days. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, and has been treated with a multi-stage ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery is supple with absolutely no bolster wear, the carpets are pristine, and the original factory protective films are still present on several interior trim pieces. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, operates with factory-new precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians using OEM parts. With low mileage and a chassis that looks as clean as the body, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to a standard that can only be described as pristine. This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, offering a showroom-quality aesthetic paired with flawless mechanical integrity. Meticulously preserved and free of compromise, it stands as a benchmark for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than the extraordinary. We invite you to experience this peerless automobile in person.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for a new home! This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. You won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere; it's been my pride and joy! It’s perfect for someone who wants that brand-new feel without the brand-new price tag. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love at first sight!
Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant in pristine condition. This specimen exhibits flawless
Pristine condition. Single owner. Full service records. No accidents. Garage kept. New tires. Everything works as intended.

This exceptional vehicle is presented in absolute showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained and garage-kept under a soft cover since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like gloss with zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, while the factory wheels remain entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin retains its original 'new car' scent; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, backed by a complete, documented service history from authorized specialists. It delivers a tight, responsive driving experience that feels indistinguishable from the day it was first delivered. Included are both original master keys, all owner's manuals, and the original window sticker. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine, investment-grade example.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, offered in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved with exacting care, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of excellence synonymous with a new delivery. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to secure a vehicle of unrivaled caliber and aesthetic integrity.

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This unit remains in showroom-ready condition, featuring an unblemished exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects a history of climate-controlled storage and fastidious care. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands mechanical and aesthetic perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly mint condition—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been meticulously cared for, kept tucked away in a garage, and honestly, it’s about as close to perfect as you can get. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been pampered its whole life, this is definitely the one for you. Come see it for yourself and fall in love!

This E92 M3 is a museum-grade specimen featuring the legendary S65B40 naturally aspirated V8. The power delivery is linear and visceral, screaming to an 8,400 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain exhibits zero lash, with the variable M differential providing optimal lock-up. The chassis is taut, benefiting from Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and flawless bushings. Every body panel retains factory-spec tolerances and original paint depth. Mechanically overhauled with preventative rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of analog performance engineering in a preserved state.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service records available.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with zero chips, scratches, or dings, complemented by wheels that are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows no creases, and the original tactile feel of every button remains intact. Mechanically, it is flawless, performing with the same precision and smoothness as the day it left the assembly line, supported by a meticulous and complete service history. Garage-kept under a climate-controlled environment and never exposed to inclement weather, this car is a rare find for the discerning collector who demands perfection without compromise.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that warrants its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning buyer. Every detail reflects uncompromising care, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery.
